page: Amazon Web Services m8ine.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an Intel x86_64 processor. It features 8 virtual CPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of dedicated system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per virtual core. It utilizes the AWS Nitro hypervisor to manage virtualization overhead.

This instance does not include local NVMe storage, relying entirely on network-attached Elastic Block Store volumes for persistent storage operations. It is optimized for network and EBS throughput, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The lack of local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring network-based storage architectures for all disk operations, which may introduce latency compared to local NVMe alternatives.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8ine.2xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for workloads requiring moderate compute and memory without the premium cost of specialized memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. The instance is designed for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and development environments.
description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance utilizing the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor running at 3.9 GHz. Managed by the Nitro hypervisor, it provides 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores and 32.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps and is optimized for EBS storage, though it lacks local instance storage. This hardware profile delivers a balanced allocation of compute and memory resources, making it suitable for standard enterprise applications, web servers, containerized microservices, and development environments that do not require local NVMe disks or hardware accelerators.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 8 Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, optimized for EBS with no local storage.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance with 8 Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: An x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring eight Intel vCPUs, thirty-two gigabytes of RAM, and twelve gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth.
bullet_points: Intel x86_64 architecture with 8 vCPUs and 4 physical cores at 3.9 GHz
32.0 GB of dedicated system memory (4.0 GB per vCPU)
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with EBS optimization
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Managed via the low-overhead AWS Nitro hypervisor
Suited for web serving, containerized microservices, and development environments
